subcodes.first_line: A Book whose verses have been sent down in Arabic, and verily it is a chapter from the Mother Book from the presence of God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, wherein is cast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزلت آیاته عربیا و انه فصل من ام الکتاب من لدی الله العزیز الوهاب و فیه یلقی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @suffering and imprisonment
